baseline.name: single-condition sensor anomaly detection baseline
baseline.description: Evaluate one fixed condition without the proposed diagnostic comparison.

problem_method_insight: sensor anomaly detection should be evaluated by separating data quality from system behavior.
falsifiable_hypothesis: The proposed comparison improves event F1 by at least 0.05 over the baseline; a smaller gain falsifies the hypothesis.

minimum_key_experiment.name: minimum sensor anomaly detection comparison
minimum_key_experiment.success_threshold: proposed event F1 - baseline event F1 >= 0.05

stop_conditions: The evaluation set has fewer than 30 independent examples
